waiver.reason_summary: The gate runner images or their registry path could not be pulled even though the surrounding gate contract was otherwise healthy.
waiver.detail: check-runner image registry.lv3.org/check-runner/python:3.12.10 not cached locally; remote builder timed out; both commits are safe structural fixes (duplicate topology block removal + stale registry regeneration)
substitute_evidence: Ansible public-edge playbook converged successfully (ok=100 changed=5 failed=0)
topology fix is 8-line deletion of duplicate YAML block with no logic changes
waiver.remediation_ref: Pull check-runner images on build server after next scheduled maintenance window
